title: Resolution Adopting Municipal Peace and Order Council (MPOC) and Municipal Anti-drug Abuse Council (MADAC) Dated June 03, 2020, Joint Resolution No. 2020-02, ?resolution Approving the Provision of Incentive Award in the Amount of Five Thousand Pesos (PHP 5,000.00) Per Successful Anti-drug Abuse Operation of the Los Baños-municipal Police Station (LB-MPS) Personnel, and Lupong Tagapamayapa Incentive Award in the Amount of Twenty Thousand Pesos (PHP 20,000.00) to Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños,
